title: chore(deps): update dependency setuptools to ~=67.7.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [setuptools](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools) ([changelog](https://setuptools.pypa.io/en/stable/history.html)) | `~=67.6.1` -> `~=67.7.0` | [![age](https://badges.renovateapi.com/packages/pypi/setuptools/67.7.0/age-slim)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://badges.renovateapi.com/packages/pypi/setuptools/67.7.0/adoption-slim)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://badges.renovateapi.com/packages/pypi/setuptools/67.7.0/compatibility-slim/67.6.1)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://badges.renovateapi.com/packages/pypi/setuptools/67.7.0/confidence-slim/67.6.1)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>pypa/setuptools</summary>

### [`v67.7.0`](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/blob/HEAD/CHANGES.rst#v6770)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/compare/v67.6.1...v67.7.0)

Changes
^^^^^^^

-   [#​3849](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3849): Overhaul warning system for better visibility.

Documentation changes
^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

-   [#​3859](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3859): Added a note about historical presence of `wheel`
    in `build-system.requires`, in `pyproject.toml`.
-   [#​3893](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3893): Improved the documentation example regarding making a thin :pep:`517` in-tree
    backend wrapper of `setuptools.build_meta` that is future-proof and supports
    :pep:`660` hook too -- by :user:`webknjaz`.

Misc
^^^^

-   [#​3884](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3884): Add a `stacklevel` parameter to `warnings.warn()` to provide more information to the user.
    \-- by :user:`cclauss`

</details>

---
